payload.answer: I could not fetch the article content because the mock fetch result was a 404 network error. I only stored the URL and your stated reason for remembering it, not any article claims.

entity_resolution.reason: No durable entity resolution is needed beyond storing the URL reference and the user's stated reason.

memory_cards.statement: The user asked to remember the article at https://example.com/missing because it is useful for memory architecture.

details: Stored the article URL reference and stated reason.
Did not store article content or claims because fetching failed with a 404 network error.

repair_options: Provide a different accessible URL for the article.
